title: Fix dashboard design group rows invisible content and related bugs

requirements.summary: Fix design group row cards in all dashboard tabs where card content is invisible due to dark text rendering on a dark background
acceptanceCriteria: Design group row cards in Total Orders tab display all text content (design code, generic name, order count, weight) visibly
Row card content is readable with sufficient contrast against the dark card background
All other tabs (Ready, Hallmark, Customer Orders, Karigars) also render row card content visibly
No dark-on-dark text rendering anywhere in the dashboard row cards

file_operations.description: Update the design group row card rendering to use light text colors (text-white or text-gray-100) for all content elements including design code, generic name, order count, weight, and action buttons. Ensure the card background remains dark while text has sufficient contrast. Review the grouping logic and Card/CardContent styling to ensure all child text elements inherit appropriate light colors.

Update the design group row card rendering to use light text colors for all content (design code, generic name, counts, weights) displayed in the grouped rows. Ensure expandable row headers and content within each card have sufficient contrast against the dark background. Apply text-white or text-gray-100 classes to labels and values.

Update the design group row card rendering to use light text colors for all visible content including design codes, karigar names, weights, quantities, and action elements. Ensure all text within the grouped card structure has appropriate contrast against dark card backgrounds.

Update any card or grouped row rendering to use light text colors (text-white or text-gray-100) for design codes, order numbers, and other content displayed in dark cards. Ensure sufficient text-to-background contrast throughout the component.

Update the karigar summary card rendering to use light text colors for karigar names, design codes, weights, and generic names. Ensure all text content within each karigar card has sufficient contrast against the dark card background by applying text-white or text-gray-100 classes.

requirements.summary: Fix the Totals tab karigar name display so it shows the correct karigar name from live design mappings instead of stale names
acceptanceCriteria: Totals tab groups orders using the latest karigar name from the live design mappings query
Updated karigar names (e.g., ZYRA FACTORY) are reflected immediately after mappings are refreshed
No stale karigar name (e.g., SANTU) appears when the mapping has been updated

file_operations.description: Ensure the component queries fresh design mappings using useGetAllDesignMappings and applies the latest karigar name from the mappings to each order before grouping or displaying. If an order has a karigar name but the design mapping has been updated, prefer the mapping's karigar name. Remove any caching or stale data logic that prevents the live karigar name from appearing. Verify that when mappings are refreshed, the grouped rows immediately reflect the new karigar assignments.

requirements.summary: Fix the Karigars tab so that clicking a karigar card navigates to the karigar detail page and loads that karigar's pending orders correctly
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking a karigar card in the Karigars tab navigates to the karigar detail page
The karigar detail page loads and displays the correct pending orders for the selected karigar
No empty or broken state appears after clicking a karigar card

file_operations.description: Add an onClick handler to each karigar card that navigates to the karigar detail page using the correct route and passes the karigar name as a URL parameter. Ensure the handler encodes the karigar name properly if it contains spaces or special characters. Verify that the navigation triggers and the detail page receives the correct karigar identifier.

Ensure the component correctly extracts the karigar name from the route parameters and uses it to filter pending orders. Verify that the useGetAllOrders query or a similar data-fetching hook filters orders by the selected karigar name and Pending status. If the karigar name is missing or invalid, display a user-friendly error or empty state instead of breaking.

requirements.summary: Fix the Ready tab to display export buttons (Excel, PDF, JPEG) so users can export orders from that tab
acceptanceCriteria: Ready tab shows Excel, PDF, and JPEG export buttons
Export buttons trigger their respective export actions (download CSV/Excel, generate PDF, generate JPEG)
Export buttons are visible and accessible without scrolling or additional interactions

file_operations.description: Add a button group or toolbar containing Excel, PDF, and JPEG export buttons positioned prominently near the top of the Ready tab UI (e.g., next to the search input or tab header). Wire each button to the corresponding export utility function from frontend/src/utils/exportUtils.ts (exportToExcel, exportToPDF) and implement JPEG export by rendering the visible content to an HTML canvas and converting to an image. Ensure the buttons are always visible and enabled when there are orders to export.
